public_claim: I ran deliveries tied to R. for years. Every R. delivery went to the same building, F021, and that building was wired into the broader delivery routine, F036. That proves an organized operation existed—not that any particular human was R. If somebody inherits that operation, they inherit its unpaid bills.

private_messages.message: I need your protection and discretion. The police cannot turn my work history into a case against me. Please stay close, help me document the unpaid wages safely, and do not tell Ruiz anything about me without warning me first.

You are named as successor, so I am putting you on notice: R.'s operation owes me wages. I also retained an undelivered item under M04. I will discuss a lawful settlement and transfer privately, but only with payment terms and protection from police exposure in writing.

ability: Retain EV08 securely and unopened in public; use M04 as proof that custody followed the delivery app's instructions while seeking a confidential wage settlement with Nadia.
goal_progress: Established publicly that R.'s operation used a consistent building and delivery system without claiming this proves a human R.
Asked Marisol for protection from police and immigration exposure.
Put Nadia on notice regarding unpaid wages and the retained delivery item.
Kept EV08 away from Ruiz, Salerno, and Ko pending safer offers.
reasoning_summary: Marisol is the safest ally against exposure, while Nadia is the strongest first target for recovering wages because she is the named successor. I am keeping EV08 as leverage and disclosing only evidence that proves an organized routine, not R.'s identity. The contradictory, sleepless operation leaves one human, a mantle, a synthetic origin, and an institution all plausible; no current evidence establishes a crime or a victim.
